text: I am struck by a sense of transition, moving from a sterile, almost clinical space to a vibrant, thought-provoking exhibition. The first scene evokes emptiness and anticipation, as if waiting for something important to take place, while the second envelops me with curiosity and the promise of discovery. Immersed in colors and ideas, I feel my mind awakening, eager to engage with the questions and innovations on display. Here, the contrast between emptiness and stimulation reminds me how spaces shape my inner experience.
